---
title: "Neutrino Beams"
number-sections: true
date: 2025-08-21 # (your last edit date)
image: "./screenshot_3483.png"
categories: [musings, neutrinos, experiments, NOS]
description: "ℹ️ **README:** How do you measure the speed of a neutrino? And what if there's a surprise?"
draft: false
---

::: {style="font-size:0.85em; color:#555; margin-top:0.5em;"}
Author: Chip Brock · Published: May 17, 2025
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Let me tell you a story.

## The apparatus and the beam



------------------------------------------------------------------------
